reviews.comment:
Lamentable , que no cobren con todos los medios de pago, por ejemplo cdni o modo nunca pude pagar, es más ellos mismos me mandaron a otra estación que si cobran

(Translated by Google)
It's unfortunate that they don't accept all payment methods; for example, I was never able to pay with CDNI or Modo. Furthermore, they themselves sent me to another station that does accept them.

Hello, 11 points for the International Driver's License process! I left with my required document in half an hour!

reviews.comment:
Pesima atencion del playero Pedro.
Tuve que cargar combustible por la noche, y no solo tuve que esperar que me atiendan, cuando no habia nadie en la estacion, sino que su trato fue por demas desagradable y maleducado.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendant, Pedro, was terrible. I had to fill up at night, and not only did I have to wait to be served when there was no one else at the station, but his attitude was extremely unpleasant and rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKekxpOURnEAE
